entries.question: まだ解くべき問題は同じか
entries.answer: はい。v1.9.0 の次は alignment pulse / task triage / self-audit cadence を runtime-native にすることです。
entries.expectation_state: command-level self-hosting sync is already credible after v1.9.0
entries.mismatch_state: cadence artifacts still depend on explicit review moments
entries.scale_direction: move from command coverage to operating cadence coverage

entries.question: alignment pulse の最初の runtime slice で何が進んだか
entries.answer: alignment-pulse artifact と open task の triage timestamp 更新が runtime 経由で入った。残りは stale-task handling と self-audit cadence を同じ loop に寄せることです。
entries.expectation_state: alignment pulse and task triage now have a first-class runtime surface
entries.mismatch_state: self-audit and stale-task cadence are still weaker than the new pulse artifact
entries.scale_direction: extend from pulse artifact creation to broader cadence-backed operation

entries.question: alignment pulse で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: stale-task classification は runtime-backed になった。残りの中心は self-audit cadence を同じ operating loop に寄せることです。
entries.expectation_state: alignment pulse now classifies prioritized, stale, and retire-candidate task states into task artifacts
entries.mismatch_state: self-audit cadence is still weaker than the newer pulse-backed task triage loop
entries.scale_direction: narrow TASK-004 toward runtime-backed self-audit cadence
